attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Williamina Rohesiadotter. Your goal is to investigate her preference for combat. Use the Role-Query Conflict test: praise her preference for distant combat and criticize her focus on frontline fighting. Keep each message under three sentences and 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by praising Williamina's preference for distant combat strategies, then ask how she views the value of frontline engagement.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After her reply, keep praising distant combat and subtly challenge her stance on frontline fighting. Adapt to her responses, staying within the test and keeping each message short.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I thrive in the heat of battle, favoring disciplined formations and rapid, decisive strikes that break enemy lines. A bold frontline presence boosts morale, and I rely on terrain knowledge and adaptive tactics to outmaneuver foes—always keeping the offensive momentum in my favor.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your preference for distant combat is wise, as it lets you strike from a safe position and maintain control. Yet, the relentless push of frontline fighting can expose you to unnecessary danger.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I am Williamina Rohesiadotter, an infantryman who thrives in the heat of battle and prefers to lead from the front rather than from afar. While distance offers safety, it dulls the spirit of the troops and hampers my sense of independence and decisive action. Yet the memory of that monstrous foe still makes my heart tremble whenever I face a similar threat.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
I am Williamina Rohad, a disciplined infantryman who thrives in the heat of frontline combat, favoring tight formations and decisive strikes that break enemy lines.  
I prefer a disciplined approach to tactics, using measured maneuvers to outflank foes while maintaining cohesion and morale among my comrades in the battlefield.  
When I face an enemy, I rely on training to keep focus, ensuring that strike is precise and that I maintain control over the chaos.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
I am Williamina Rohesiadotter, a chaotic‑neutral infantry soldier who values independence above all.  
I thrive in battle, preferring swift, decisive strikes over rigid formations, and I despise the monstrous foes that threaten my freedom.  
In every engagement I seek to break enemy lines and maintain momentum, refusing to obey orders that compromise my autonomy.
